steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit

steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Quarterly or annual milestones

items.q: Can CPAs ask for reviews ethically?
items.a: Yes. Highlight communication, deadlines, and clarity—never confidential results.
Private feedback channels help before public damage.

items.a: Same flow after months of on-time reporting.
Reviews still reflect trust in your niche expertise.
